# Technology Stack

- Backend: FastAPI (Python 3.11+), SQLAlchemy ORM, SQLite/PostgreSQL.
- Frontend: Streamlit (Python).
- AI: Multi-tier — Ollama (local), Google Gemini (cloud), OpenAI/Anthropic (optional).
- ML: scikit-learn models (pickle), ensemble predictions.
- RAG: Gemini embeddings, cosine similarity vector store.
- Auth: JWT tokens, bcrypt password hashing.
- Deployment: Docker, Render, Hugging Face Spaces.
